failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: PRlHWH
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 401 Documented: 201, 422
[401] Unauthorized:
`{"detail":"Invalid or missing API key."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "0"}' http://localhost:8000/nodes

1. Test Case ID: 1WS5Ub
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 201, 422
[400] Bad Request:
`{"detail":"There was an error parsing the body"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '��l� L' http://localhost:8000/nodes

1. Test Case ID: s1yoFk
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 404 Documented: 200, 422
[404] Not Found:
`{"detail":"Node '0' not found."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/categories/0

1. Test Case ID: N1NWQM
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 404 Documented: 200, 422
[404] Not Found:
`{"detail":"Node '0' not found."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/categories/0/subtree

1. Test Case ID: snab6y
- Server error
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 503 Documented: 200
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"detail":"Service temporarily unavailable."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/flaky

1. Test Case ID: X2hjlM
- Undocumented Content-Type
Received: text/plain; charset=utf-8 Documented: application/json
[200] OK:
`Hello world!`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/flaky

1. Test Case ID: wbCF1J
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[422] Unprocessable Content:
`{"detail":[{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["query","level"],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"null"}]}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' 'http://localhost:8000/nodes?level=null&parent_id=&leaves_only=true'

1. Test Case ID: dgtVMP
- Response violates schema
"n must be a positive integer." is not of type "array"
Schema at /components/schemas/HTTPValidationError/properties/detail:
{ "type": "array", "items": { "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ValidationError" }, "title": "Detail" }
Value:
"n must be a positive integer."
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[422] Unprocessable Content:
`{"detail":"n must be a positive integer."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/rabbit/0

1. Test Case ID: mFjYwU
- Server error
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 500 Documented: 200, 422
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"detail":"Traceback (most recent call last):\n File \"/Users/maaretp/Documents/cgi-code/architecture-aware-api-testing/rabbit.py\", line 37, in <module>\n p(i((1/5**.5)*(((1+5**.5)/2)**(i(a[1])+1)-((1\n ~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^~~~~~~~~~~~\nOverflowError: (34, 'Result too large')"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/rabbit/21548

1. Test Case ID: 9gz1wm
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 404 Documented: 200, 422
[404] Not Found:
`{"detail":"Job '0' not found."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/async/0

1. Test Case ID: XtadFa
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 404 Documented: 200, 422
[404] Not Found:
`{"detail":"Node '0' not found."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' http://localhost:8000/nodes/0

1. Test Case ID: 0wE8QC
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 401 Documented: 200, 422
[401] Unauthorized:
`{"detail":"Invalid or missing API key."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PATCH -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://localhost:8000/nodes/error-handling

1. Test Case ID: JCH05Y
- Response violates schema
"Provide at least one of 'name' or 'description'." is not of type "array"
Schema at /components/schemas/HTTPValidationError/properties/detail:
{ "type": "array", "items": { "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ValidationError" }, "title": "Detail" }
Value:
"Provide at least one of 'name' or 'description'."
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[422] Unprocessable Content:
`{"detail":"Provide at least one of 'name' or 'description'."}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X PATCH -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://localhost:8000/nodes/error-handling

1. Test Case ID: 44PR94
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200, 422
[400] Bad Request:
`{"detail":"There was an error parsing the body"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' http://localhost:8000/categories curl -X GET -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' http://localhost:8000/nodes/z-m curl -X PATCH -H 'X-API-Key: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d $'܈�Qa\x11�\x06=�' http://localhost:8000/nodes/z-m
